title: No Heart Blinking
description: Disables the blinking animation in your health bar. Useful for Exordium or other frame/fps limiters
body:
## Showcase
Before

![blinking hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323fbc0a128a66a6e0c76bb3c5cac6406170dfcf.png)

After

![no blinking hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a7824a13130633d4fb07a86d8590f2cd76461a8.png)

## Description
When you take damage in Minecraft, usually your health blinks pink a few times where your hearts have been lost. With this texture pack, it will no longer blink and instead display that you lost health. This helps a lot when you have something like [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) that makes it so your gui renders at a low framerate. Usually, you wouldn't know how much health you're really at because the game has to wait for the blinking animation. Now, you can easily tell at a glance how much health you're at.
